creator: johalun0@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 182270
Patch to add complete port for weston 2.0

Port for weston 2.0

Is x11-wm a good location for it? Without adding a category, seems like the most appropriate. 

This patch also adds weston port to x11-wm/Makefile and "weston-launch" group to GIDs. 

Some cleanup/fix might be needed by someone more experienced in port Makefiles.
